# BUILTECH

> The construction industry's AI & software directory. Compare 140+ tools rated by real contractors across 16 trades.

BUILTECH at bestconstructionapps.com helps construction professionals find and compare the best software and AI tools for their trade. We cover project management, estimating, field service, scheduling, document management, BIM, and more.

## Tools Directory

Over 140 construction software tools with ratings, reviews, pricing, features, pros, and cons. Each tool is categorized as Software, AI Agent, or Platform.

- [Browse all tools](https://bestconstructionapps.com/search)
- [Full tool data](/llms-full.txt)

## Trades

Software recommendations organized by 16 construction trades:

- [General Contracting](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/general-contracting)
- [Electrical](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/electrical)
- [Plumbing](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/plumbing)
- [HVAC](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/hvac)
- [Roofing](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/roofing)
- [Concrete & Masonry](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/concrete-masonry)
- [Carpentry & Framing](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/carpentry-framing)
- [Estimating & Bidding](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/estimating-bidding)
- [Painting & Coatings](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/painting-coatings)
- [Flooring](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/flooring)
- [Drywall & Insulation](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/drywall-insulation)
- [Landscaping & Irrigation](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/landscaping-irrigation)
- [Windows & Doors](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/windows-doors)
- [Solar & Renewable Energy](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/solar-renewable)
- [Cabinetry & Countertops](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/cabinetry-countertops)
- [Tile & Stone](https://bestconstructionapps.com/trades/tile-stone)

- [Togal.AI vs STACK Takeoff](https://bestconstructionapps.com/compare/togal-ai-vs-stack-takeoff)
- [View all comparisons](https://bestconstructionapps.com/compare)
